mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 235 in the CPIAUCSL series triggers central bank tightening expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as bond yields rise and equity valuations contract.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high CPIAUCSL readings.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payrolls (PAYEMS) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings prospects.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to produce positive returns in > 60% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) in late-cycle expansion regimes indicates labor market tightness, pushing equity prices higher as companies pass increased wages to consumers through price increases.
failure_condition: SPX fails to generate positive returns during periods of declining UNRATE in late-cycle contexts.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) indicate strong demand for residential construction, boosting S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through sectoral spillovers into materials and industrials.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative returns in > 40% of periods with rising HOUST data.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth exceeding 137k in the PAYEMS series signals strong labor market performance, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through increased consumer spending and corporate investment.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 137k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates expanding aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through sustained corporate earnings growth.
failure_condition: The combined growth of GDPC1 and INDPRO fails to generate positive returns in > 50% of cases, or their co-movement breaks down.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer credit growth (RSAFS) in a low-interest environment signals elevated risk-taking behavior, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as liquidity flows into equities.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 20d returns when RSAFS growth exceeds 427k and FEDFUNDS remains below 0.1%.
